While the government attempted diplomacy and negotiation, prolonged warfare escalated tensions significantly. Ultimately, the failure to repel continued waves of barbarian invasions led to administrative paralysis. Without unified leadership, the empire could no longer sustain its defenses, resulting in the permanent dissolution of imperial rule following the final barbarian invasions.<|im_end|>
